# Social Media Posts Archive

## Posts Generated by social-post-blotato Skill

Posts will be published and archived here by the social-post-blotato skill during project-workflow routine executions.

### Format

Each post includes:
- Platform (LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram)
- Post number (if multiple per platform)
- Content and hashtags
- Publication date/status
- Link to published post (if available)

---

[Posts will be added as they are generated and published]
